TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_David_Andersen, title = David_Andersen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Andersen} }

S.FORM: David Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1980, byacing te 1 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 113 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. qnxan na sraral David Andersen htgan beh Melbourne.yaba nya ga Danny yaya nya ga Mary.maki sa Langkestun pqwasan laqi cikuy ga t'aring mzuy Tara na mari. 11 kawas ga, Andersen tmwang qalang nqu pinsqunan na Tara mari Frankston Blues ,maki sa te qutux kawas nqu pinshloyan nha ga,maki sa mszit nqu mopuw sazing kawas ga lmaqux qu pinsqunan nha inlungan ru magal te qutux lalu. Andersen ga pkekaq mrkes nqu linhoyan mari tara si tehuk sa mopuw magal kawas maki Frankston Blues . ru tmwang sangka Frankston Blues na mlikuy . pincyuwagan nya' Australia ru Italy(1998–2004) 1998-2004 kawas,masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Australia. Andersen ru Australia msqun 簽訂 sazing kawas 1998-1999 kawas pspung,hiya mzyu mari 25 場 pspung. 1999 kawas ru Italian LBA na Kinder Bologna 簽訂 qutux kawas 合約. 2006 kawas 6 byacing 26 ryax, Andersen maki 2002 kawas magal NBA na Atlanta Hawks . 2002-2003 kawas, musa Kinder Bologna ,maki qani te qutux magal LBA pspung. 2003 kawas, Andersen 離開 Bologna,suruw lga,Montepaschi Siena 簽約 maki 2003-2004 kawas pupung.hiya magal te qutux ru magal LBA MVP qsabu. hiya tmwang msqun pspung EuroLeague payat. Russia (2004-2008) 2004 kawas, Andersen ru trang CSKA Moscow sazing kawas biru .te qutux pspung maki CSKA,magal msqun Russia pspung ru Russia koka te qutux.ru 2005 kawas tmwang te payat EuroLeague. Andersen 2003-2004 kawas tmwang EuroLeague pspung uzi. 2005-2006 kawas taring pspung,hiya ga nbu la. 2006 kawas, EuroLeague payat pspung.Andersen ru CSKA Moscow 續約,suruw lga,幫助 hiya magal 2007 ru 2008 kawas blaq balay te qutux ru 2008 kawas, msqun pspung maki EuroLeague. NBA (2009-2011) 2009 kawas 7 byacing 14ryax, Atlanta Hawks Andersen 交易 Houston Rockets pzyuw pila ru pspung. 2009 kawas 8 byacing 11 ryax,Andersen ru Houston Rockets 簽訂 cingay kawas biru . Italy 2011 kawas 6 byacing 28 ryax, Andersen ru Montepaschi Siena 簽訂 cyugal kawas 合同. 2011 kawas 12 byacing 19 ryax,NBA mhngaw lga,hiya ga 被解僱 New Orleans Hornets. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

David Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1980, byacing te 1 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 113 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2002 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. qnxan na sraral David Andersen htgan beh Melbourne.yaba nya ga Danny yaya nya ga Mary.maki sa Langkestun pqwasan laqi cikuy ga t'aring mzuy Tara na mari. 11 kawas ga, Andersen tmwang qalang nqu pinsqunan na Tara mari Frankston Blues ,maki sa te qutux kawas nqu pinshloyan nha ga,maki sa mszit nqu mopuw sazing kawas ga lmaqux qu pinsqunan nha inlungan ru magal te qutux lalu. Andersen ga pkekaq mrkes nqu linhoyan mari tara si tehuk sa mopuw magal kawas maki Frankston Blues . ru tmwang sangka Frankston Blues na mlikuy . pincyuwagan nya' Australia ru Italy(1998–2004) 1998-2004 kawas,masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Australia. Andersen ru Australia msqun 簽訂 sazing kawas 1998-1999 kawas pspung,hiya mzyu mari 25 場 pspung. 1999 kawas ru Italian LBA na Kinder Bologna 簽訂 qutux kawas 合約. 2006 kawas 6 byacing 26 ryax, Andersen maki 2002 kawas magal NBA na Atlanta Hawks . 2002-2003 kawas, musa Kinder Bologna ,maki qani te qutux magal LBA pspung. 2003 kawas, Andersen 離開 Bologna,suruw lga,Montepaschi Siena 簽約 maki 2003-2004 kawas pupung.hiya magal te qutux ru magal LBA MVP qsabu. hiya tmwang msqun pspung EuroLeague payat. Russia (2004-2008) 2004 kawas, Andersen ru trang CSKA Moscow sazing kawas biru .te qutux pspung maki CSKA,magal msqun Russia pspung ru Russia koka te qutux.ru 2005 kawas tmwang te payat EuroLeague. Andersen 2003-2004 kawas tmwang EuroLeague pspung uzi. 2005-2006 kawas taring pspung,hiya ga nbu la. 2006 kawas, EuroLeague payat pspung.Andersen ru CSKA Moscow 續約,suruw lga,幫助 hiya magal 2007 ru 2008 kawas blaq balay te qutux ru 2008 kawas, msqun pspung maki EuroLeague. NBA (2009-2011) 2009 kawas 7 byacing 14ryax, Atlanta Hawks Andersen 交易 Houston Rockets pzyuw pila ru pspung. 2009 kawas 8 byacing 11 ryax,Andersen ru Houston Rockets 簽訂 cingay kawas biru . Italy 2011 kawas 6 byacing 28 ryax, Andersen ru Montepaschi Siena 簽訂 cyugal kawas 合同. 2011 kawas 12 byacing 19 ryax,NBA mhngaw lga,hiya ga 被解僱 New Orleans Hornets. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*i* an*ers~ɕen ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa melβourne, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu atlanta ħawks~ɕ. qnxan na s~ɕraral *a*i* an*ers~ɕen ħtɣan βeħ melβourne.jaβa nja ɣa *annj jaja nja ɣa marj.maki s~ɕa laŋkes~ɕtun pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ɣa tʔariŋ mzuj tara na mari. ** kawas~ɕ ɣa, an*ers~ɕen tmwaŋ qalaŋ nqu pins~ɕqunan na tara mari *ranks~ɕton βlues~ɕ ,maki s~ɕa te qutux kawas~ɕ nqu pins~ɕħlojan nħa ɣa,maki s~ɕa ms~ɕzit nqu mopuw s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ ɣa lmaqux qu pins~ɕqunan nħa inluŋan ru maɣal te qutux lalu. an*ers~ɕen ɣa pkekaq mrkes~ɕ nqu linħojan mari tara s~ɕi teħuk s~ɕa mopuw maɣal kawas~ɕ maki *ranks~ɕton βlues~ɕ . ru tmwaŋ s~ɕaŋka *ranks~ɕton βlues~ɕ na mlikuj . pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ aus~ɕtralia ru italj(*********) ****-**** kawas~ɕ,mas~ɕoq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru maki aus~ɕtralia. an*ers~ɕen ru aus~ɕtralia ms~ɕqun ** s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ,ħija mzju mari ** * ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ ru italian lβa na kin*er βoloɣna ** qutux kawas~ɕ **. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, an*ers~ɕen maki **** kawas~ɕ maɣal nβa na atlanta ħawks~ɕ . ****-**** kawas~ɕ, mus~ɕa kin*er βoloɣna ,maki qani te qutux maɣal lβa ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕen ** βoloɣna,s~ɕuruw lɣa,montepas~ɕʦ~ʨħi s~ɕiena ** maki ****-**** kawas~ɕ pupuŋ.ħija maɣal te qutux ru maɣal lβa m*p qs~ɕaβu. ħija tmwaŋ ms~ɕqun ps~ɕpuŋ euroleaɣue pajat. rus~ɕs~ɕia (****-****) **** kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕen ru traŋ ʦ~ʨs~ɕka mos~ɕʦ~ʨow s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ βiru .te qutux ps~ɕpuŋ maki ʦ~ʨs~ɕka,maɣal ms~ɕqun rus~ɕs~ɕia ps~ɕpuŋ ru rus~ɕs~ɕia koka te qutux.ru **** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ te pajat euroleaɣue. an*ers~ɕen ****-**** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ euroleaɣue ps~ɕpuŋ uzi. ****-**** kawas~ɕ tariŋ ps~ɕpuŋ,ħija ɣa nβu la. **** kawas~ɕ, euroleaɣue pajat ps~ɕpuŋ.an*ers~ɕen ru ʦ~ʨs~ɕka mos~ɕʦ~ʨow **,s~ɕuruw lɣa,** ħija maɣal **** ru **** kawas~ɕ βlaq βalaj te qutux ru **** kawas~ɕ, ms~ɕqun ps~ɕpuŋ maki euroleaɣue. nβa (****-****) **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **rjax, atlanta ħawks~ɕ an*ers~ɕen ** ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ pzjuw pila ru ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,an*ers~ɕen ru ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ ** ʦ~ʨiŋaj kawas~ɕ βiru . italj **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, an*ers~ɕen ru montepas~ɕʦ~ʨħi s~ɕiena ** ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ **. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,nβa mħŋaw lɣa,ħija ɣa *** new orleans~ɕ ħornets~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
